judge_reason: Description A describes a high-contrast black-and-white scan of a dark paper form, while Description B describes a stamp in red ink and punch holes, which are contradictory visual elements for the same page.
original_image_tags: High-contrast black-and-white scan of a dark, possibly black, paper form titled "RESTRICTED". The form is a "CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS" with 26 numbered fields filled in with white typewritten text. The paper shows signs of age, with visible holes on the left side, suggesting it was once kept in a binder. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, distressed letters at the top and bottom.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A black-and-white document scan of a typed “CHECK-LIST – UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS” form marked “RESTRICTED,” showing a single page with numbered entries filled in by typewriter, including incident number 117 and details such as date, location (Memphis, Tenn.), observer name, number of objects, direction, altitude, speed, color, shape, and remarks; no photograph or diagram is present.*
